summary: Reviewed the fix transcript skeleton, handoff, prior failed review, and both commit diffs (`01921b8...` and `4458ec1...`). The new commit resolves the prior blockers by making Popover UI-action seam persistence independent of stale in-memory profile lists and by adding deterministic store-backed fallback for rendered indicator seam getters used by the previously failing cross-surface assertions.
